targetAudience.heading: Here's who we built our products for

products.name: AGENT FACTORY
products.forDesc: Agent Factory is built for business leaders who are tired of waiting on data teams for answers. If you're in marketing, sales, finance, or customer success and you've ever waited days for a report that should've taken minutes. Agent Factory acts as your AI Data Analyst, sitting on top of your company's data and answering your business questions directly.

products.name: DATA FLASH
products.metricLabel:
hours of efforts saved
in Data Migration
products.forDesc: DataFlash is built for CTOs, data engineers, and data leaders who are tired of spending months writing custom migration code every time they move to a new platform. If you're migrating databases, consolidating data sources, dataFlash handles it through configuration, not code with built-in validation, quality checks, and audit tracking.

faq.heading: Common questions from data leaders.
faq.subheading: Architecture, security, timelines — the questions we get on every first call.

items.q: How does Aidetic differ from an AI consultancy?
items.a: Most consultancies leave you with slides and a pilot. We leave you with running software — Agent Factory and Data Flash — plus the integration work to make them yours. Fixed scope, fixed timeline, working systems.

items.q: Can our data stay inside our VPC / cloud?
items.a: Yes. Both products deploy inside your perimeter — AWS, Azure, GCP or on-prem. Models can be hosted by us, by you, or routed to your private endpoint. Data never leaves your account.

items.q: Which LLMs and warehouses do you support?
items.a: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Mistral, plus self-hosted open-source. Snowflake, Databricks, BigQuery, Redshift, Postgres, MongoDB, S3 and 50+ SaaS sources via connectors.

items.q: How long until something is in production?
items.a: A scoped use case is in production in 4–8 weeks. The first agent or pipeline is usually live in a sandbox by week two — we work in two-week increments with weekly demos.

items.q: Do you handle compliance — SOC 2, HIPAA, GDPR?
items.a: Aidetic is SOC 2 Type II. Both products include audit logs, role-based access, PII redaction and data-residency controls. HIPAA and GDPR-aligned deployments are standard.

items.q: What does a typical engagement look like?
items.a: A two-week discovery to map the highest-leverage use case, then 6–10 weeks to deliver a production rollout. We bring product engineers and ML engineers — no offshored body shop.

finalCta.heading:
Ready to put AI to work —
for real?
finalCta.subheading: Tell us about the use case. We'll come back in 48 hours with a scoped plan, a fixed timeline and a working demo two weeks in.
